pageContext.name: Sukuna Nendoroid
pageContext.description: 'Know your place, fool.'  From the anime series 'Jujutsu Kaisen' comes a Nendoroid of Sukuna!  He stands at 3.93' tall and comes with three face plates including a standard face, a sneering face, and a crazed face. Optional parts include a Malevolent Shrine illustration sheet and a cow skull.  Be sure to add him to your collection and display him with other Nendoroids from 'Jujutsu Kaisen'!
